The Recapture of Coruscant occurs in 64:6 per ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', so the battle at Gyndine must occur approximately three months prior.</ref>

A '''battle''' was fought at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]] late in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], two months before the [[Battle of Selvaris]]. The [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] tried, and failed, to liberate the world. The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] took the captured Alliance soldiers to their [[Prison/Legends|prison]] camp on [[Selvaris]].<ref name="Unifying" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1stm}}
